productDisplayName: Forever New Women Creme de Menthe Blue Dresses
description: Composition Foam green pleated dress with spaghetti straps, made of 100% silk with a 100% polyester lining, ruched neckline, flexible boning in the bust area attached belt below the bustline, zipper and hook closure at the back, and a flared skirt Fitting Regular Wash careCold hand wash inside out separately with a gentle detergent Do not soak, bleach or tumble dry Drip dry in shade Cool iron on reverse side Dry cleanable When you want to look and feel gorgeous, this foam green pleated dress from forever new should be your first choice. Bask in the liquidy softness of silk and the appreciative glances you get from every one when you wear this flirty and feminine strappy dress. Team it with silver stilettos and diamond drop earrings to look like a princess. Model statisticsThe model wears size M in dresses Height-5.9", Chest-33"
